prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: A Casserole for the Missing
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Mother Was Right All Along
Tagline: Where every secret comes home.
Theme: Some homes hold families. Some hold motive.
Omen: a child drawing stairs
Relationship dynamic: overbearing mother tension
Props: snow globe, boat key, casserole dish

Cast:
- Gavin Marlowe | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=architect | threat_aura=0.23 | space=retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence | secrets=buried one traumatic detail under work for years
- Daniel Bell | archetype=decorative_husband | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=hospital administrator | threat_aura=0.44 | space=unused portable classroom holding archived disciplinary files | secrets=has a storage unit he refuses to explain

- Cole Hawthorne | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=widow with a foundation | threat_aura=0.77 | space=side room with a space heater and old family records | secrets=inherited documents she should have burned
- Wyatt Hale | archetype=rugged_scamp | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=widowed boat mechanic | threat_aura=0.43 | space=retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence | secrets=helped someone disappear for compassionate reasons
- Daniel Cross | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=innkeeper | threat_aura=0.42 | space=retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence | secrets=saw the wrong person near the lake once and never shut up about it
- Tess Vale | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Noah Sutton | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Daniel Bell is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Gavin Marlowe says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Blackthorn Lake.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Daniel?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Tess. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Gavin. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The snow globe is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Cole."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
